name: Fishborg Harpooner
name_jp: フィッシュボーグ－ハープナー
desc: You can reveal this card and 1 WATER monster in your hand; Special Summon 1 of them and discard the other. You can only use this effect of "Fishborg Harpooner" once per turn. If this card is sent to the GY as material for a WATER Synchro Monster: You can negate the effects of 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls, until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal this card and 1 WATER monster in your hand; Special Summon 1 of them and discard the other. You can only use this effect of "Fishborg Harpooner" once per turn. If this card is sent to the GY as material for a WATER Synchro Monster: You can negate the effects of 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls, until the end of this turn.
eff: You can reveal this card and 1 WATER monster in your hand; Special Summon 1 of them and discard the other. You can only use this effect of "Fishborg Harpooner" once per turn. If this card is sent to the GY as material for a WATER Synchro Monster: You can negate the effects of 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls, until the end of this turn.

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Activates if used as Synchro Material
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
